title: Service Details

fields.label: Key Features
fields.name: service_key_features
fields.instructions: One feature per line. Each line becomes a checklist item in the service showcase.
fields.placeholder:
Fast turnaround & clear communication
Mobile-first & fully responsive
SEO-friendly code structure

fields.label: Detail Text
fields.name: service_detail_text
fields.instructions: Optional short paragraph shown below the key features list (italic accent style).

fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.name: service_cta_label
fields.instructions: Leave blank to use the default "Learn More" label.

fields.label: Service Stats
fields.name: service_stats
fields.instructions:
One stat per line — format: value|label. Example:
50+|Projects Delivered
98%|Client Satisfaction
3x|Average ROI

Max 3 lines shown.

description: Extra fields for the Service Showcase block — key features checklist, detail text, CTA label, and stat numbers.
